name: Nous Hermes 2 Mixtral 8x7B DPO
archDisplay: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts transformer (8 experts, top-2 routing, Mixtral architecture)
note: Flagship MoE fine-tune of Mixtral 8x7B, SFT+DPO on 1M+ mostly GPT-4-generated samples; first community model to beat Mixtral Instruct broadly.

results.notes: BigBench average (custom subset used by Nous)
acc_norm, part of GPT4All suite on the official HF model card (same table already used for arc-challenge/hellaswag/winogrande in the corpus).
acc_norm, part of GPT4All suite on the official HF model card.
acc_norm, part of GPT4All suite on the official HF model card.

5-shot MMLU, computed by averaging the raw per-subject acc values (57 subjects) in the HF Open LLM Leaderboard (old/v1) details dataset's latest run (2024-01-22). Not on the vendor's own model card, hence independent/third-party.
5-shot GSM8K acc from the same HF Open LLM Leaderboard (old) details dataset raw results JSON (harness|gsm8k|5, acc 0.71645).
MC2 score from the same Open LLM Leaderboard details dataset (harness|truthfulqa:mc|0, mc2 0.54826). Not present on the vendor's own HF card, which only lists GPT4All/AGIEval/BigBench.

verificationNotes: Confirmed on HF model card: Apache-2.0 license, ARC-C norm 64.25, HellaSwag norm 84.89, Winogrande 76.16, AGIEval 46.05, BigBench 49.70 all literally present. Mixtral base spec (46.7B total / 12.9B active / 32K context) confirmed verbatim on Mistral AI's official 'Mixtral of experts' blog post. Decoded the cited tweet's Twitter snowflake ID (1746988416779309143) to 2024-01-15 20:11 UTC, exactly matching the record's release date, and confirmed via search that the tweet text matches the quoted 'first model to beat Mixtral Instruct' claim. No changes made.
